description: The head of scouting needs to assign scouts to watch specific amateur tournaments.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the schedule for upcoming amateur tournaments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has a list of all relevant tournaments.

nodes.task_description: Get the availability of all team scouts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the schedule for each scout.

nodes.task_description: Assign scouts to tournaments based on their expertise and location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an assignment list, sending each scout to a specific tournament.
